Prove-Up Hearing As To Deft Western Macarthur By Plft Geromi Clay (Asbestos)
Off Calendar Apr-18-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: CHRIS ANDREAS, Esq. of Brayton-Purcell, 415/898-1555 on behalf of plaintiff(s). No appearance on behalf of Western MacArthur. Request for judgment in favor of the plaintiff ESTATE OF DECEDENT JULIUS CLAY and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $426,550.00; judgment in favor of plaintiff GEROMI CLAY and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00, judgment in favor of plaintiff LOREDIA CLAY and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00, judgment in favor of plaintiff DIVIONIA DANGERFIELD and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00, judgment in favor of plaintiff TERESA CLAY and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00, judgment in favor of plaintiff JULIUS CLAY III and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00, judgment in favor of plaintiff TAMMY BRANT and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00, judgment in favor of plaintiff ELVIN CLAY and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00, and judgment in favor of plaintiff ELYUS CLAY and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $200,000.00 plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined later by the Court was made. The Court took matter Under Submission as of Apr-16-2002 by ALFRED G. CHIANTELLI. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: M. TORREANO, #8600 (503)
